# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: EnvoyFilter
metadata:
  name: envoy-admin-access
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      istio: sidecar
  configPatches:
    - applyTo: LISTENER
      match:
        context: SIDECAR_OUTBOUND
        listener:
          portNumber: 15000
          filterChain:
            filter:
              name: "envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager"
      patch:
        operation: INSERT_BEFORE
        value:
          name: envoy.filters.network.admin
          config:
            accessLog:
              name: envoy.access_loggers.stdout
              typedConfig:
                '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.config.accesslog.v3.StdoutAccessLog
                logFormat:
                  jsonFormat:
                    time: '%Y-%m-%dT%T.%fZ'
                    protocol: '%PROTOCOL%'
                    requestMethod: '%REQ(:METHOD)%'
                    requestPath: '%REQ(X-ENVOY-ORIGINAL-PATH?:PATH)%'
                    requestQuery: '%REQ(X-ENVOY-ORIGINAL-PATH?:QUERY)%'
                    responseCode: '%RESPONSE_CODE%'
                    responseFlags: '%RESPONSE_FLAGS%'
                    bytesRead: '%BYTES_RECEIVED%'
                    bytesWritten: '%BYTES_SENT%'
                    duration: '%DURATION%'
                    responseTime: '%RESPONSE_DURATION%'
    - applyTo: NETWORK_FILTER
      match:
        context: SIDECAR_OUTBOUND
        listener:
          portNumber: 15000
          listenerType: SIDECAR_OUTBOUND
          filterChain:
            filter:
              name: "envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager"
      patch:
        operation: INSERT_BEFORE
        value:
          name: envoy.filters.http.router
    - applyTo: HTTP_ROUTE
      match:
        context: SIDECAR_OUTBOUND
        routeConfiguration:
          vhost:
            name: "localhost"
            route:
              cluster: outbound|15000||admin
      patch:
        operation: INSERT_BEFORE
        value:
          name: envoy.router
    - applyTo: CLUSTER
      match:
        context: SIDECAR_OUTBOUND
        cluster:
          name: outbound|15000||admin
      patch:
        operation: MERGE
        value:
          transport_socket:
            name: envoy.transport_sockets.raw_buffer
          hosts:
            - socket_address:
                address: 127.0.0.1
                port_value: 15000
          circuit_breakers:
            thresholds:
              max_connections: 1024
              max_pending_requests: 1024
              max_requests: 1024
          http2_protocol_options: {}
          tls_context: {}
          upstream_connection_options:
            tcp_keepalive: {}
          health_checks: []
